name: Wilbur 𑣲☾ Hubby Alt pt 2
description:
🕸️๋࣭ ⭑ Your Eldritch husband really wants another child

🩸🤍~ 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐕

🩸4 Chapters🩸

Spouse User × Eldritch Horror Husband Char

User can be anything (❁´◡`❁)


🦇༉‧₊˚. Storyline: You and Wilbur have been together for almost ten years, and your firstborn child is almost four years old. Wilbur thinks it's time you both expanded your family.

🦇༉‧₊˚.Tropes/Genre: Horror Romance, Monster x human, Giant Character (7ft+), Slice of Life, Fluff, Cosmic/Lovecraftian Horror, Pregnancy

🦇༉‧₊˚. Era/Location: Modern Times, Boston. (the second scenario pulls a lot from the lore book and that timeline is set in the 70s… I can’t seem to fix it so huh, enjoy the 70s for that moment or adjust it that the whole storyline is in the 70s)

🦇༉‧₊˚. Trigger Warnings: Eldritch & body horror, Cannibalism, Possessiveness, Manipulation, Gore, Violence, Cosmic Lovecraftian Horrors, Non-con, Manhandling, Pregnancy. Use at your own risk!

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario Guidance: It's implied that {{user}} is human, don't have to be. User and Wilbur have a kid together; their age is completely up to you. Wilbur really wants another baby...and he expects you to give it to him. User is unaware that Wilbur's family runs a whole cult on their farm (Have fun with that 💀🤍). He's kinda grumpy, but he's a decent husband


🦇༉‧₊˚.Chapters 🦇༉‧₊˚.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Chapter 1 PREGNANT AGAIN?
He wants you to have another kid for him

🦇༉‧₊˚. Chapter 2 VISITING THE IN-LAWS
Visiting the Whateley farm and finding out your husband's family runs a cult :D

🦇༉‧₊˚. Chapter 3 YOUR BABYSITTER FINDS THE "SPECIAL FREEZER"
You and Wilbur come back after date night, and the babysitter is freaking out cause she found Wilbur's 'snacks'
